{{Quote|Slayke is an idealist, a rare commodity in these times.|[[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]|<ref name="Jedi Trial">''[[Jedi Trial]]''</ref>}}
[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Zozridor Slayke''' was a red-haired [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] who served in the [[Judicial Department/Legends|Judicial Starfleet]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and commanded the [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] ''[[Scarlet Thranta]]'' prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
Slayke's history prior to joining the [[Judicial Forces/Legends|Judicial Forces]] was murky even to those who served with him.

Shortly before the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the ''Scarlet Thranta'' was assigned to patrol the [[Sluis sector/Legends|Sluis sector]], near [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] space. Angered by the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate's]] unwillingness to act against the Separatists, Slayke went rogue, taking the ''Thranta'' and entering the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] with intentions of waging a private war against the Separatists. Other ships, including some mercenaries and civilians, soon joined the charismatic Slayke. He named this ragtag group the [[Sons and Daughters of Freedom]], commonly referred to as Freedom's Sons.

Although no battles were reported before the start of the Clone Wars, a 45,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]] bounty was placed on his head by the leaders of [[Sluis Van/Legends|Sluis Van]], and a [[Judicial Department/Legends|Judicial Department]] task force, under the command of the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Nejaa Halcyon]], was [[Mission to Bpfassh (Separatist Crisis)|dispatched]] to recapture the vessel and take Slayke into custody. A large segment of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] populace, however, considered him a hero. Eventually, after the Clone Wars broke out, Freedom's Sons became something of an auxiliary militia for the Jedi, and Slayke was officially pardoned by [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], given a set of IFF codes identifying him as friendly to Republic and commissioned as a [[Privateer/Legends|privateer]] to fight the Separatists.

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Zozridor worked with Halcyon and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] to [[Battle of Praesitlyn|defend]] the planet of [[Praesitlyn/Legends|Praesitlyn]] and its crucial [[Intergalactic Communications Center]] from invading Separatist forces led by the [[Muun/Legends|Muun]] [[Pors Tonith/Legends|Pors Tonith]].

Slayke had a talent for inspiring the soldiers under his command but held a dislike for clone troopers and other Republic forces, referring to the former as 'test-tube soldiers' and calling Republic Quartermaster [[Mess Boulanger]] 'A blasted box kicker'.
